active_profile_source: S12 structured candidate package plus active reviewer/venue profile controls; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: free-form adversarial comments and a list of findings
downstream_design_force: S14 receives only normalized actionable findings with S14_route and nearest responsible stage hints
S15 never receives a direct S13 rewrite instruction without S14 repair planning
RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can distinguish adversarial findings from accepted repairs or export readiness

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: review object inventory, actionable findings schema, or S14 route is missing
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: review becomes a rewrite/repair/PDF-primary pass or findings lack evidence/location/severity
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local reviewer label or rationale defect that does not alter routing/actionability
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: speculative reviewer risk retained as risk signal without forced repair

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S13 owns adversarial review/report defects; content defects are routed as findings to S14, never repaired directly by S13.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH review comments do not automatically become repair tasks; S14 decides accepted repair scope after actionability review.
